## Discussion

The combined representation is only available when the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/AES/GCM/Nonce] size is the default size of 12 bytes. The data layout of the combined representation is nonce, ciphertext, then tag.

# combined

**Instance Property**

A combined element composed of the nonce, encrypted data, and authentication tag.

## Declaration

```swift
var combined: Data? { get }
```

## Discussion

The combined representation is only available when the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/AES/GCM/Nonce] size is the default size of 12 bytes. The data layout of the combined representation is nonce, ciphertext, then tag.
title: combined
